title: Cadremploi.fr Jobs Scraper
description: Extract job listings from Cadremploi.fr using its listing API. Provide either a Cadremploi listing URL or keyword/location filters.

url.title: Start URL
url.description: Cadremploi listing URL, for example https://www.cadremploi.fr/emploi/liste_offres or a filtered listing URL.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Optional keyword. When provided, it overrides keyword values from the URL.

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional location text such as Paris, Lyon, or Marseille.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of jobs
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to save.

max_pages.title: Maximum pages
max_pages.description: Safety cap for API pages to fetch.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional. Leave disabled for maximum speed, or enable Apify Proxy when your network gets blocked.
